code:
%%{Infra_WorkerNode}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_EtcdCluster] --> IDLE

    IDLE --> VALIDATING: swap_expert(Infra_IngressController)

    VALIDATING --> PREPARING: validation passed
    VALIDATING --> FAILED: validation failed

    PREPARING --> EXECUTING: checkpoint created
    PREPARING --> FAILED: load failed

    EXECUTING --> COMMITTING: atomic swap done
    EXECUTING --> ROLLING_BACK: swap failed

    COMMITTING --> IDLE: cleanup done

    FAILED --> ROLLING_BACK: auto-rollback

    ROLLING_BACK --> IDLE: restored

    note right of VALIDATING
        Check:
        • Architecture match
        • Tensor shapes
        • Data types
    end note

    note right of PREPARING
        Actions:
        • Load new weights
        • Create checkpoint
        • Allocate memory
    end note

    note right of EXECUTING
        ACID Atomic:
        • Lock acquired
        • Pointer swap
        • Lock released
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个状态图，描述模型热更新在推理集群里的完整生命周期。核心是从IDLE状态开始，经过VALIDATING、PREPARING、EXECUTING，最后到COMMITTING或者ROLLING_BACK。
明白。VALIDATING阶段具体检查什么？另外触发状态转换的事件名称需要体现Infra_IngressController的交互吗？
VALIDATING要检查架构匹配、Tensor形状和数据类型。触发事件叫swap_expert，参数是Infra_IngressController。另外PREPARING阶段需要加载权重、创建检查点、分配内存。
好的，我已经把VALIDATING到PREPARING的转换标为"validation passed"，失败分支到FAILED。PREPARING之后到EXECUTING是"checkpoint created"。需要给这三个状态加注释框详细说明吗？
需要加注释。EXECUTING阶段特别关键，要强调ACID原子性：获取锁、指针交换、释放锁。还有，EXECUTING成功到COMMITTING，失败要ROLLING_BACK。
已添加EXECUTING的ACID注释。现在FAILED状态有两个来源：VALIDATING失败和PREPARING的load failed。FAILED之后应该能自动回滚吧？
对，FAILED要自动回滚到ROLLING_BACK，事件叫auto-rollback。另外ROLLING_BACK恢复完成后回到IDLE。整个流程的起点我忘了说，应该是从Infra_EtcdCluster进入IDLE。
完成。所有路径已连通：COMMITTING清理后回IDLE，ROLLING_BACK恢复后也回IDLE。注释框分别放在VALIDATING、PREPARING、EXECUTING右侧，包含你要求的检查项、动作列表和ACID说明。
